overall.description: Third-person gameplay from a western-themed open world game showing a cowboy character walking through tall prairie grass at night. The character briefly stops to let a horse pass before continuing toward distant settlement lights on the horizon.

scene_state.functional_zone: open prairie grassland with scattered trees

agents.ego_description: walking steadily through tall grass toward a large tree on the right, following a faint dirt path

entered.detail: tall wild grass swaying slightly, covering the ground throughout the scene
large deciduous tree with spreading branches silhouetted against the night sky
cluster of evergreen trees on the distant left horizon
narrow worn path cutting through the grass, barely visible in the low light
dark blue night sky with scattered clouds and visible stars

segments.scene_description: The character walks through an open prairie at night, surrounded by tall grass. A large oak tree looms on the right side growing closer as the character advances along a faint dirt trail. The night sky is clear with scattered clouds, and distant pine trees are visible on the left horizon.

events.description: character stops walking and stands still as a horse approaches from ahead
horse passes by the character on the right side and continues past

agents.ego_description: stopping to stand still as a horse approaches and passes by on the right

notable_agents.action: horse walking toward the character then passing by on the right side

segments.scene_description: The character stops walking as a horse emerges from the darkness ahead and passes by on the right. The scene remains in the open grassland with the dirt path continuing forward. The interaction is brief as the horse moves past and the character prepares to continue.

events.description: distant warm lights from a settlement become visible on the right horizon
character approaches and passes under a large tree canopy, partially obscuring the sky

agents.ego_description: continuing along the dirt path toward distant lights, walking steadily through the grass

entered.detail: warm orange glow of distant fires or lanterns from a settlement on the horizon
low rocky hillside visible in the distance on the left

segments.scene_description: The character resumes walking along the trail toward distant warm lights visible on the right horizon, likely from a campsite or settlement. The character passes under the canopy of a large tree as the path continues through the rolling grassland. The distant lights grow slightly brighter as the character approaches, with rocky terrain visible on the left.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous camera movement through a moonlit prairie that transitions from a solitary trek into an approach toward a distant settlement. It begins with the character walking along a faint dirt trail through tall grass, passing a looming oak tree on the right under a clear, cloud-scattered night sky. As the character pauses, a horse emerges from the darkness to pass by on the right before the journey resumes forward along the path. The scene then shifts as the character moves under the canopy of a large tree, with the terrain opening up to reveal rocky ground on the left. Finally, the camera advances through the rolling grassland as warm, distant lights on the horizon grow brighter, signaling the approach to a campsite or town.
